name: toast
description: A programmatic toast notification system for displaying temporary messages with customizable placement, transitions, and auto-dismiss functionality.
usage_guidelines: Use for non-intrusive feedback messages (success, errors, info).
Call toast.push() to show notifications programmatically.
Set block: true for full-width toasts.
Use toast.remove() or toast.removeAll() for manual dismissal.
Toasts auto-dismiss based on Notification component duration.

return_value.description: Toast API object with methods for managing notifications.

push.description: Displays a toast notification. Returns toast key for later removal.

styling_info.visual_description: Toasts appear at specified screen corners with smooth scale or fade animations. Multiple toasts stack vertically with spacing. Supports full-width block mode.

Do: Use Notification component as message content
Remove toasts on navigation if needed
Use block mode for important messages
Dont: Don't use for critical errors (use Dialog)
Don't show too many toasts simultaneously
Don't forget to handle toast removal

AlertToast.title: Alert Toast
AlertToast.code:
import Alert from '@/components/ui/Alert' import toast from '@/components/ui/toast' import Button from '@/components/ui/Button' const AlertToast = () => { function blockAlert() { toast.push( Success , { offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0, transitionType: 'fade', block: true, }, ) } return (
) } export default AlertToast
